title: Rāmganj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Rāmganj, with a Z-Score of +3.00. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 9.5 GG. 
 The high temperature is also accompanied by high humidity, with an Umidita of 83%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The Vento, with a speed of 12.5 km/h, is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
